title: Latest Art Obsession!! Acrylic Pour Paintings DIY
excerpt: Not sure I can explain just how obsessed I am with this technique that I recently learned. My cousin got me hooked and we made a lot of these canvases that to us, look like works of art! The process…
body:
Not sure I can explain just how obsessed I am with this technique that I recently learned. My cousin got me hooked and we made a lot of these canvases that to us, look like works of art! The process was truly amazing (although a bit messy!) and the results make us so happy. Check out the video and let me know if you try it!

SUPPLIES:
Acrylic Paints (we just went to Michaels) but these look great | Plastic Drop Cloth | 
Canvas 10x10 | Floetrol | Gel Medium (matte) | Gel Medium (glossy) | Varnish
